mapper.select: SELECT /* MainMapper.selectRecommendProdCtgScndList 추천 상품 카테고리 2Depth 목록 조회 */ A.RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_CD , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_NM , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_BAS_DESC , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_DTL_DESC , A.DEPTH_KEY , A.UP_RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_CD , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_OUTPUT_CD , A.PROD_DIV_CD , A.SORT_ODRG , A.USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_IMG_PATH , LINK_USE_YN , LINK_URL_PC , LINK_URL_MO FROM NMCP_RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_BAS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEPTH_KEY = '2' AND A.PROD_DIV_CD = #{prodDivCd} AND A.UP_RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_CD = #{upRecommendProdCtgCd} AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY A.SORT_ODRG ASC

SELECT /* MainMapper.selectRecommendProdCtgRelList 추천 상품 카테고리 요금제 목록 조회 */ A.RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_CD , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_GDNC_SEQ , A.RATE_CD , A.PROD_ID , A.PRDT_ID , A.SALE_PLCY_CD , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_BAS_DESC , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_DTL_DESC , A.RECOMMEND_YN , A.NEW_YN , A.SALE_PRICE , A.LINK_CD , A.LINK_URL , A.SORT_ODRG , A.USE_YN , A.LABEL_CODE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_REL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.RECOMMEND_PROD_CTG_CD = #{recommendProdCtgCd} AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(A.PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY A.SORT_ODRG ASC

SELECT A.PROD_ID --상품아이디 , A.PROD_CTG_ID --상품분류아이디 (lte,3g) , CASE WHEN A.PROD_CTG_ID = '03' THEN '3G' WHEN A.PROD_CTG_ID = '04' THEN 'LTE' WHEN A.PROD_CTG_ID = '08' THEN '5G' ELSE 'LTE' END AS PROD_CTG_NAME --상품(색인) , A.PROD_NM --상품명(색인) , A.MAKR_CD --제조사코드 , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID --대표모델ID , A.SHOW_YN --노출여부 , A.SALE_YN --판매여부 , A.OFW_DATE --출고일자 , A.LIST_SHOW_TEXT --목록노출텍스트(색인) , A.LIST_SHOW_OPTN --목록노출옵션(색인) , A.APD_DESC_1 --추가설명1(색인) , A.APD_DESC_2 --추가설명2(색인) , A.APD_DESC_3 --추가설명3(색인) , A.STCK_TYPE_TOP --스티커노출(상) , A.STCK_TYPE_TAIL --스티커노출(하) , A.SNTY_PROD_DESC --단말기상품설명(색인) , A.SNTY_NET --단말기네트워크(색인) , A.SNTY_DISP --단말기디스플레이(색인) , A.SNTY_SIZE --단말기크기(색인) , A.SNTY_WEIGHT --단말기무게(색인) , A.SNTY_MEMR --단말기메모리(색인) , A.SNTY_BTRY --단말기배터리(색인) , A.SNTY_OS --단말기OS(색인) , A.SNTY_WAIT_TIME --단말기대기시간(색인) , A.SNTY_CAM --단말기카메라(색인) , A.SNTY_VIDE_TLK --단말기영상통화(색인) , A.SNTY_PROD_NM --단말기명(색인) , A.SNTY_REL_MONTH --출시월(색인) , A.SNTY_COLOR --단말기색상(색인) , A.SNTY_MAKER --단말기제조사/브랜드명(색인) , A.SNTY_MODEL_ID --단말기모델번호(색인) , A.MAKR_NM --제조사명 중고폰에서만사용 , A.SHAND_YN -- 중고폰여부 , A.INVENTORY_AMT --중고폰 재고수량 , A.SALE_PRICE --중고폰 판매가격 , A.PROD_GRADE --종고폰 등급(색인) , A.SHAND_TYPE --중고폰분류값(중고폰,외산폰) , CASE WHEN A.SHAND_TYPE = '01' THEN '중고폰' WHEN A.SHAND_TYPE = '02' THEN '외산폰' ELSE '중고폰' END AS SHAND_TYPE_NAME --중고폰분류(색인) , A.RECOMMEND_RATE --추천요금제 , A.USED_WARRANTY --중고폰 워런티(색인) , CASE WHEN A.USED_WARRANTY = '01' THEN '중고폰' WHEN A.USED_WARRANTY = '02' THEN '외산폰' ELSE '신폰' END AS USED_WARRANTY_NAME --중고폰 워런티(색인) , IMG.SNTY_COLOR_CD --색상코드 , IMG.IMG_TYPE_CD --이미지유형구분(앞,뒤..) , IMG.IMG_PATH --이미지경로 , SNTY.HNDSET_MODEL_NM --단말기모델명(색인) FROM NMCP_PROD_BAS A LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS SNTY ON A.PROD_ID = SNTY.PROD_ID AND SNTY.RPRS_PRDT_YN = 'Y' -- 대표 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT PROD_ID, SNTY_COLOR_CD, IMG_TYPE_CD, IMG_PATH FROM ( SELECT PROD_ID, SNTY_COLOR_CD, IMG_TYPE_CD, IMG_PATH, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY PROD_ID ORDER BY IMG_TYPE_CD) RNK FROM NMCP_PROD_IMG_DTL ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) IMG ON A.PROD_ID = IMG.PROD_ID AND SNTY.PROD_ID = IMG.PROD_ID AND SNTY.ATRIB_VAL_CD_1 = IMG.SNTY_COLOR_CD WHERE A.SHOW_YN ='Y' AND A.SALE_YN ='Y' AND SNTY.HNDSET_MODEL_ID = #{prdtId} ORDER BY A.SHOW_ODRG

SELECT /* MainMapper.selectRateRecommendInqrBasList 요금제추천문의기본 목록 조회 */ A.RATE_RECOMMEND_INQR_SEQ , A.SORT_ODRG , A.RATE_RECOMMEND_INQR_SBST , A.ANS_SBST1 , A.ANS_SBST2 , A.ANS_SBST3 , A.ANS_SBST4 , A.USE_YN , A.PSTNG_START_DATE , A.PSTNG_END_DATE , A.ANS_SBST1_DESC , A.ANS_SBST2_DESC , A.ANS_SBST3_DESC , A.ANS_SBST4_DESC FROM NMCP_RATE_RECOMMEND_INQR_BAS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE ORDER BY A.SORT_ODRG ASC

SELECT A.RATE_RECOMMEND_INQR_REL_SEQ , A.ANS_NO , A.RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , A.RATE_CD , A.RECOMMEND_PROD_DESC , A.SORT_ODRG , A.USE_YN , A.PSTNG_START_DATE , A.PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_RATE_RECOMMEND_INQR_REL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN A.PSTNG_START_DATE AND A.PSTNG_END_DATE AND ANS_NO = #{ansNo} ORDER BY SORT_ODRG
